contentBlocks.original:
आद्यं रङ्गमिति प्रोक्तं विमानं रङ्गसंज्ञितम् ।
श्रीमुष्णं वेङ्कटाद्रिं च साळग्रामं च नैमिशम् ।
तोयाद्रिं पुष्करं चैव नरनारायणाश्रमम् ।
अष्टौ मे मूर्तयः सन्ति स्वयंव्यक्ता महीतले ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
ādyaṃ raṅgamiti proktaṃ vimānaṃ raṅgasañjñitam .
śrīmuṣṇaṃ veṅkaṭādriṃ ca sāl̤agrāmaṃ ca naimiśam .
toyādriṃ puṣkaraṃ caiva naranārāyaṇāśramam .
aṣṭau me mūrtayaḥ santi svayaṃvyaktā mahītale ..
contentBlocks.translation: First, called "Ranga", the great temple (of Srirangam), made known by the (great lord) Ranga, (Then) Srimushanam and Venkatadri, Salagrama and Naimisha, Toyadri (Thiruneermalai), Pushkara and indeed Nara Narayana Ashrama (i.e. Badarikashrama or Badrinath), These eight manifestations of mine present on earth are Swayam-Vyakta (Self-Manifested).
contentBlocks.meanings: आद्यं (ādyaṃ) – first; रङ्गम् (raṅgam) – Ranga; इति (iti) – thus; प्रोक्तं (proktaṃ) – called; विमानं (vimānaṃ) – temple; रङ्गसंज्ञितम् (raṅgasañjñitam) – known by Ranga (raṅga:Ranga | sañjñitam:known by); श्रीमुष्णं (śrīmuṣṇam) – Srimushnam; वेङ्कटाद्रिं (veṅkaṭādriṃ) – Venkata Hill (veṅkaṭa:Venkata | ādriṃ:hill); च (ca) – and; साळग्रामं (sāl̤agrāmaṃ) – Salagrama; च (ca) – and; नैमिशम् (naimiśam) – Naimisha; तोयाद्रिं (toyādriṃ) – Toyadri (toya:water | ādriṃ:hill); पुष्करं (puṣkaraṃ) – Pushkara; चैव (caiva) – and indeed; नरनारायणाश्रमम् (naranārāyaṇāśramam) – Nara Narayana Ashrama (nara:Nara | nārāyaṇa:Narayana | āśramam:ashrama); अष्टौ (aṣṭau) – eight; मे (me) – my; मूर्तयः (mūrtayaḥ) – manifestations; सन्ति (santi) – are; स्वयंव्यक्ता (svayaṃvyaktā) – self-manifested (svayaṃ:self | vyaktā:manifested); महीतले (mahītale) – on earth (mahī:earth | tale:on);
